dashboard.label: Upload bigram model
dashboard.description: Convert a bigram frequency CSV into a conditional-probability model usable by the entropy command.

div.p: Upload a CSV of bigram frequencies with a header row, e.g.:

The app groups counts by the first character, computes conditional probabilities q(c2 | c1) and saves them as <name>_probabilities.csv in this app's lookups directory, ready for | entropy field=... lookup=<name>_probabilities.csv.

div.label: Model name
div.div: Letters, digits, "_" and "-" only. Output file: <name>_probabilities.csv

div.label: Frequency CSV
div.div: Columns: bigram, count. Bigrams are lowercased; duplicate bigrams are summed.

html.pre: index=dns | entropy field=query lookup=english_bigrams_probabilities.csv | where entropy > 9 | stats count by query, entropy | sort - entropy
html.p: Low score = looks like the modeled language. High score = random-looking string (hashes, DGA domains, C2 masquerading as noise). Dots, hyphens, commas and spaces are stripped before scoring, so full domain names can be passed as-is.
